revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:Infobox historic site]]
{{Rcat shell|{{R from move}}{{R from modification}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.text:
#REDIRECT [[Template:Infobox historic site]]
{{Rcat shell|{{R from move}}{{R from modification}}}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "#REDIRECT" to "#redirect"
revision.text:
#redirect [[Template:Infobox historic site]]
{{Rcat shell|{{R from move}}{{R from modification}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: add [[:Category:Templates transcluded in mainspace]] [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
#redirect [[Template:Infobox historic site]]
{{Rcat shell|{{R from move}}{{R from modification}}}} [[Category:Templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Templates transcluded in mainspace]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
#redirect [[Template:Infobox historic site]]
{{Rcat shell|{{R from move}}{{R from modification}}}} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates transcluded in mainspace]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] to [[Category:infobox templates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
#redirect [[Template:Infobox historic site]]
{{Rcat shell|{{R from move}}{{R from modification}}}} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates transcluded in mainspace]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] [[Category:infobox templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] to [[Category:fandom sync]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
#redirect [[Template:Infobox historic site]]
{{Rcat shell|{{R from move}}{{R from modification}}}} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates transcluded in mainspace]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] [[Category:fandom sync]] [[Category:infobox templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: renamed [[Category:Fandom sync]] -> [[Category:Independently git synced pages]] [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25377160640|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
#redirect [[Template:Infobox historic site]]
{{Rcat shell|{{R from move}}{{R from modification}}}} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates transcluded in mainspace]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] [[Category:Independently git synced pages]] [[Category:infobox templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Sync from repo miraheze_unique/ [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25460205297|commit triggered pipeline]]
